articles.author: Lee Ying Shan, Sarah Min
articles.title: Stock futures dip after chip-led rally; SoftBank soars 11% as Asia tech stocks rise: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.
articles.content: U.S. stock futures edged lower Thursday night after a strong Wall Street session that put the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite on track for weekly gains, while Asian technology stocks rallied Fri… [+2479 chars]
